\tzpentry{ID4033}{Angular Velocity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4033 introduces Angular Velocity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\\Omega^\\top = \\nabla \\cdot \\mathbf{F}_t$
\]
